arts.ttl: Tottenham vs AZ Alkmaar predicted as Europa League quarter-finals fate decided
arts.sum: After a disappointing loss in the first leg, Spurs need to beat AZ Alkmaar by two goals or more to secure their spot in the Europa League quarter-finals. So, can Spurs pick up a much-needed victory to book their spot in the Europa League quarter-finals?
